Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EmbeddedServiceConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EmbeddedServiceConfig
public class EmbeddedServiceConfig extends Metadata

Java class for EmbeddedServiceConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmbeddedServiceConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="areGuestUsersAllowed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authMethod" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceAuthMethod" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="branding" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deploymentFeature" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceDeploymentFeature"/>
         <element name="deploymentType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceDeploymentType"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceAppointmentSettings" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceAppointmentSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceCustomComponents" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceCustomComponent" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceCustomLabels" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceCustomLabel" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceCustomizations" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceCustomization" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceFlowConfig" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceFlowConfig" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceFlows" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceFlow" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceLayouts" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceLayout" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="shouldHideAuthDialog" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="site" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getEmbeddedServiceCustomComponents

      public List<EmbeddedServiceCustomComponent> getEmbeddedServiceCustomComponents()
      Gets the value of the embeddedServiceCustomComponents property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the embeddedServiceCustomComponents property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmbeddedServiceCustomComponents().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmbeddedServiceCustomComponent

      Returns:
      The value of the embeddedServiceCustomComponents property.

    • getEmbeddedServiceCustomLabels

      public List<EmbeddedServiceCustomLabel> getEmbeddedServiceCustomLabels()
      Gets the value of the embeddedServiceCustomLabels property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the embeddedServiceCustomLabels property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmbeddedServiceCustomLabels().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmbeddedServiceCustomLabel

      Returns:
      The value of the embeddedServiceCustomLabels property.

    • getEmbeddedServiceCustomizations

      public List<EmbeddedServiceCustomization> getEmbeddedServiceCustomizations()
      Gets the value of the embeddedServiceCustomizations property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the embeddedServiceCustomizations property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmbeddedServiceCustomizations().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmbeddedServiceCustomization

      Returns:
      The value of the embeddedServiceCustomizations property.

      public List<EmbeddedServiceFlow> getEmbeddedServiceFlows()
      Gets the value of the embeddedServiceFlows property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the embeddedServiceFlows property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmbeddedServiceFlows().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmbeddedServiceFlow

      Returns:
      The value of the embeddedServiceFlows property.

      Gets the value of the embeddedServiceLayouts property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the embeddedServiceLayouts property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmbeddedServiceLayouts().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmbeddedServiceLayout

      The value of the embeddedServiceLayouts property.
